series.title: Vikings 2026!
series.shortDescription: After a vanished Norse expedition reappears in deep space, rival crews clash over prophecy, salvage, and the right to chart a new Viking age among the stars.

series.title: Stardust Station
series.tagline: Frontier peace hangs by a docking clamp.
series.shortDescription: At a remote transfer hub where every faction must refuel, station staff juggle smugglers, diplomats, and system-wide crises before one bad arrival starts a war.

series.title: Azure Reach
series.tagline: The blue frontier hides older empires.
series.shortDescription: Survey teams on an ocean planet uncover floating megacities and abyssal relics that force them to choose between scientific discovery, corporate claims, and native survival.

series.title: Sunforge Outlaw
series.tagline: Steal the core. Burn the regime.
series.shortDescription: A blacklisted forge pilot raids solar foundries for fusion cores, igniting a high-heat rebellion through the furnace lanes of a star-powered industrial empire.
